basic_details.job_title: ALIMCO Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for PMU Consultant & Senior Media Consultant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India (ALIMCO)
basic_details.short_information: Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India (ALIMCO) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 4 PMU – Consultant & Senior Media Consultant Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for PSU jobs. Candidates with Graduate/Postgraduate in specified disciplines for PMU Consultant; PG in Mass Communication or Journalism for Senior Media Consultant. qualification can directly attend the interview on .

age_limit.age_details: Max 28 years for PMU Consultant, Max 45 years for Senior Media Consultant as on 01-05-2026.
age_limit.details: PMU - Consultant: Maximum age limit is 28 years as on 01-05-2026. Senior Media Consultant: Maximum age limit is 45 years as on 01-05-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Postgraduate in specified disciplines for PMU Consultant; PG in Mass Communication or Journalism for Senior Media Consultant.
qualification.details: PMU - Consultant: Graduate or Postgraduate in Engineering (preferably Data Science, Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, etc.), Commerce, Mathematics, Economics, Statistics, Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, Public Administration, Political Science. Equivalent RCI-affiliated courses (final-year passed-out candidates only) from a recognized University/Institution. Preferably one year of experience in Central/State Government, PSU, Autonomous Body, or CPSE. Proficiency in Computer Applications. Good presentation, written, and oral communication skills. Senior Media Consultant: PG in Mass Communication or Journalism. Minimum 05 years of post-qualification experience. Content creation, drafting press releases/press notes, social media handling, media liaison and related communication activities.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 75,000/- for PMU Consultant, Rs. 50,000/- for Senior Media Consultant

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ALIMCO recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The walk-in dates for PMU Consultant are 03-06-2026 and 04-06-2026, and for Senior Media Consultant, it is 05-06-2026. Candidates should report on these dates.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ALIMCO recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the PMU – Consultant and Senior Media Consultant posts in the ALIMCO recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for PMU Consultant?
faq.answer: For the PMU Consultant position, candidates need to be a Graduate or Postgraduate in specified disciplines like Engineering, Commerce, Mathematics, Economics, Statistics, Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, Public Administration, or Political Science. Equivalent RCI-affiliated courses are also accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Media Consultant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Media Consultant post is 45 years as of 01-05-2026. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the PMU Consultant position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the PMU Consultant position is Rs. 75,000/- per month. This is a contractual position for a tenure of 3 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these ALIMCO posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for both PMU Consultant and Senior Media Consultant posts will be through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be conducted at ALIMCO Regional Marketing Centre, New Delhi, located at 110029.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for ALIMCO recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q9. What is the tenure of the contract for these positions?
faq.answer: Both the PMU Consultant and Senior Media Consultant positions are on a contract basis for a tenure of 3 years.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), ID proof, and passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview.
